ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "iaga_code" TEXT /* IAGA code for the station */,
  "geolon" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the station */,
  "geolat" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the station */,
  "aacgmlon" REAL /* AACGM longitude of the station */,
  "aacgmlat" REAL /* AACGM latitude of the station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator managing the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator or organization */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization responsible for the operation of the station */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the measurement is taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "magnetic_field_x" REAL /* Magnetic field component in X direction */,
  "magnetic_field_y" REAL /* Magnetic field component in Y direction */,
  "magnetic_field_z" REAL /* Magnetic field component in Z direction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the measurement (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type (e.g., total field, vector field) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of measurement */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the measurement entails */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the measurement */,
  "processing_algorithm" TEXT /* Data processing algorithm used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the measurement */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report (e.g., date range, station selection) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
